name: null_spacer
description: Invented homopolymer-ish AT-rich spacer regions sandwiched between coding cassettes in the (fictional) test_fictive genome. Very low Shannon entropy, no detectable tandem period above 4 bp, GC heavily biased low. Used as a low_complexity exemplar for the EXTENDING.md walkthrough.
sources: synthetic, no biological basis — see EXTENDING.md example.
